hero_eduname: B.eng. In Software Technology, SDU Odense
about_intro: Hi! My name is Victor and I'm a passionate software engineering student from Odense. I'm studying for a B.Eng. in Software Technology at SDU, and work alongside my studies as a fullstack web developer at AirPlate, where I build modern web applications from end to end.
about_passion: I'm passionate about building user-friendly and accessible solutions that combine a strong technical foundation with an eye for design. Whether it's a snappy REST API in Go or a responsive SvelteKit frontend with DaisyUI, I thrive where technology and design meet.
about_hobbies: Outside of code, you'll probably find me with a cup of coffee, immersed in a new side project, or on the lookout for the next interesting problem to solve.
hero_positions: I'm currently looking for new adventures in roles involving DevOps, Cloud, Infrastructure and Web Development
experience_summary: ["Fullstack further development of the main product, DevOps onboarding and implementation of GitHub Actions, management of infrastructure and database, test design and implementation, as well as advising and collaborating with the CTO and CEO.", "Fullstack web development, integrating data into Mapbox from WebSockets and external APIs, building a webshop with Stripe and Shipmondo integrations, OAuth implementation with Firebase."]
